José Clemente Orozco

1 work in the gallery.
Click any image to enlarge. Use ← → or close with Esc.
Prometheus (Pomona College)
by José Clemente Orozco
Mexican muralism · 1930
A towering Prometheus bringing fire into Frary Hall, Pomona College. The first significant Mexican mural commissioned in the United States — and the doorway for a wave of muralists who followed.
←L'Estampe Originale Follower of Lelio Orsi→
